channel.title: FMallSectionsDR
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from FMallSectionsDR, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: America 250: Have a Heart
item.description: In God we trust and rest and renew.

item.title: More Beltway Mischief: The Renewable Fuel Standard and Small-Refinery Exemption
item.description: Farm-state lawmakers want to require everyone else to pad ethanol producers’ pockets.

item.title: Social Security Insolvency Creeps Further Up
item.description: Though the trust fund is an accounting fiction, its exhaustion, now expected in just six years, has significant practical implications.

item.title: The Iranian People Are Forgotten
item.description: While most aspects of the Iran deal are ambiguous at this point, its abandonment of Iranians is sadly clear.
